MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ARVA ANDERSON's Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to dismiss representative action without prejudice is granted.

Order signed.
